zh.lifeSummary: 當Count Ludwig of Froburg II於1160年5月3日出生在瑞士索洛瑟特利巴賀福侯包格時，他的父親Hermann von Froburg31歲，母親Udilhild von Dillingen23歲。他和Richenza, Princess of Dillingen至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1212年8月23日在他的家鄉享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: Froburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eward, Kurt.  Scandinavian Nils, Sven.

Swedish (Fröberg): habitational name from any of several places in Sweden named Fröberga, from frö ‘fertile, rich’, or from the name of the Nordic goddess Fröja, + berg ‘mountain, hill’; or possibly an ornamental name composed of the same elements.
Danish (Frøberg): habitational name from a place called Frøbjerg.

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Count Ludwig of Froburg II was born on 3 May 1160, in Froburg, Trimbach, Solothurn, Switzerland, his father, Hermann von Froburg, was 31 and his mother, Udilhild von Dillingen, was 23. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Richenza, Princess of Dillingen. He died on 23 August 1212, in his hometown, at the age of 52.

Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Richenza, Princess of Dillingen. Il est décédé le 23 août 1212, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count Ludwig of Froburg II родился 3 мая 1160 г. в местности фробург, тримбач, солотурн, Швейцария, его отцу по имени Hermann von Froburg было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Udilhild von Dillingen, 23.
